records.ety: [OE. hysope, ysope, OF. ysope, F. hysope, hyssope, L. hysopum, hyssopum, hyssopus, Gr. <?/, <?/, an aromatic plant, fr. Heb. ēsov.]

defs: A plant (Hyssopus officinalis). The leaves have an aromatic smell, and a warm, pungent taste.
notes: ☞ The hyssop of Scripture is supposed to be a species of caper (Capparis spinosa), but probably the name was used for several different plants.
